What does "un amigo" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "un amigo" = a male friend. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "una amiga" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "una amiga" = a female friend. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "un bano" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "un bano" = a bathroom. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "una biblioteca" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "una biblioteca" = a library. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "un carro" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "un carro" = a car. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "una ciudad" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "una ciudad" = a city. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.explanation: "un espejo" = a mirror. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "una idea" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "una idea" = an idea. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.explanation: "un gato" = a cat. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.explanation: "una libreria" = a bookstore. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.explanation: "una mujer" = a woman. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "un pianista" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "un pianista" = a male pianist. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "una pagina" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "una pagina" = a page. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "un sillon" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "un sillon" = an armchair. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "una persona" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "una persona" = a person (male or female). Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "un tiquete" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "un tiquete" = a ticket. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.question: What does "una pluma" mean in English?
questions.explanation: "una pluma" = a pen. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.explanation: "unos barcos" = some boats. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.explanation: "unas artistas" = some female artists. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

questions.explanation: "unos gatos" = some cats. Un/unos = masculine, una/unas = feminine.

Write the plural form of: "el dia"
questions.explanation: "el dia" → "los dias". Vowel endings add -s, consonant endings add -es.

Complete the phrase with the correct form of "old": "el hombre ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el hombre". Answer: "el hombre viejo"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "difficult": "la situacion ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la situacion". Answer: "la situacion dificil"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "marvelous": "el idioma ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el idioma". Answer: "el idioma maravilloso"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "nice": "la persona ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la persona". Answer: "la persona simpatica"

questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la flor". Answer: "la flor amarilla"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "beautiful": "el jardin ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el jardin". Answer: "el jardin hermoso"

questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la muchacha". Answer: "la muchacha delgada"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "white": "el vino ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el vino". Answer: "el vino blanco"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "expensive": "el apartamento ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el apartamento". Answer: "el apartamento caro"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "inexpensive": "el carro ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el carro". Answer: "el carro barato"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "small": "el hotel ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el hotel". Answer: "el hotel pequeno"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "fantastic": "el clima ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el clima". Answer: "el clima fantastico"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "intelligent": "la hermana ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la hermana". Answer: "la hermana inteligente"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "interesting": "el libro ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el libro". Answer: "el libro interesante"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "big": "la ciudad ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la ciudad". Answer: "la ciudad grande"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "rich": "el hombre ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el hombre". Answer: "el hombre rico"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "young": "el dentista ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "el dentista". Answer: "el dentista joven"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "red": "la bolsa ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la bolsa". Answer: "la bolsa roja"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "blue": "la ventana ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la ventana". Answer: "la ventana azul"

questions.question: Complete the phrase with the correct form of "green": "la planta ___"
questions.explanation: The adjective must agree with the gender of "la planta". Answer: "la planta verde"

Write the plural form of the phrase: "la lampara azul"
questions.hint: Change the article from "la" to "las", and make the noun and adjective plural.
questions.explanation: "la lampara azul" → "las lamparas azules" (plural with matching article and adjective)

questions.question: Write the plural form of the phrase: "el amigo fantastico"
questions.hint: Change the article from "el" to "los", and make the noun and adjective plural.
questions.explanation: "el amigo fantastico" → "los amigos fantasticos" (plural with matching article and adjective)
